Find Us
Located in the heart of Shoreditch, The Vault Gym is easily accessible from Old Street, Liverpool Street and Shoreditch High Street stations.

Lower Ground Floor
Zetland House
5-25 Scrutton Street
London EC2A 4 HJ
Tel: 020 7247 1111
jon@thevaultgym.com 
suzy@thevaultgym.com

seo.title: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Luxury Personal Training Gym in Shoreditch, London
seo.description: Looking for a premium private gym in Central London? The Vault Gym in Shoreditch offers exclusive personal training, just minutes from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street stations. Contact us today.
